calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: July 28, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Robert Lehman, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Michael Varn.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 14, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Lease Agreement dated 4/1/07---------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---10 Day Notice Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 6/9/08--------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mercy Housing California, and against defendant Michael Varn as follows:

Plaintiff Mercy Housing California shall recover from defendant Michael Varn Rent/Per Diem Damages in the amount of $1,884.96, Costs To Be Determined pursuant to a Cost Memorandum, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,884.96.

Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 480 Ellis Street, #434, San Francisco, CA. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Off Calendar
